description_long: This house features a sleek, modern design with clean lines and a minimalist aesthetic. The structure is composed of two main rectangular volumes, each topped with flat, overhanging roofs in a muted gray tone. Expansive glass windows and sliding doors line the longer facade, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection to the outdoors. A large swimming pool is integrated into the front patio area, bordered by light-colored concrete or stone decking. The house appears to have a single story, with open-plan living spaces and a possible garage or covered area adjacent to the main building. The overall look is contemporary, emphasizing horizontal lines and open, functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, and a spacious pool set in a minimalist concrete patio. The design emphasizes clean lines and open, functional outdoor living.
description_view_0: Front view showing the long facade with large glass windows, the main entrance area, and the full length of the pool.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the pool, the overhanging roof, and the compact secondary structure adjacent to the main house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, the pool's position relative to the main structure, and the secondary building's alignment.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, the entry path, and the relationship between the two main building volumes.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows in horizontal bands
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with large glass doors, no visible steps, and a flat overhang for shelter
